full_text:
Liu Xuan (Wenheng) 劉璿 (文衡)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xuan (劉璿), styledWenheng (文衡), was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Son of Liu Shan, and his crown prince. Died during Zhong Hui’s rebellion. Liu Xuan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom. Liu Xuan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
